name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_acceptance_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeAcceptanceGate aggregates transient surface-wake result seeds into a lab validation acceptance decision.
note: Primary lab acceptance gate for transient surface wake evidence.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_result_seed
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeResultSeed supplies per-target pressure velocity and arrival-time pass/fail seeds.
note: Per-target validation seed input.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_validation_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeValidationRunMatrix supplies live-run availability and evidence slots for those seeds.
note: Execution-status input.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeReadinessGate blocks transient validation before source and probe support are ready.
note: Readiness gate input.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_temporal_resolution
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeTemporalResolution supplies sample-period requirements behind arrival-time evidence.
note: Temporal evidence constraint.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_transit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeTransit supplies target pressure wake speed and fast-to-slow arrival bounds.
note: Physics target input.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future live transient powered-hover surface-wake validation.
note: Upstream CFD target for live evidence.

name: surface_wake_lab_acceptance_gate
value: Accept transient surface-wake validation only when live transient probe support exists and all 128 expected rotor surface clearance seeds are present ready and passing; accepted evidence remains lab validation rather than runtime gameplay coupling.
note: Method separates complete lab evidence from missing evidence and gameplay handoff.
